mapper.sql: id, record_id, class_id, grade_id, snapshot_date, student_count, standard_size, snapshot_source, is_used, usage_count, remark, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM class_size_snapshots WHERE record_id = #{recordId} ORDER BY class_id

SELECT
FROM class_size_snapshots WHERE class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY snapshot_date DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO class_size_snapshots (record_id, class_id, grade_id, snapshot_date, student_count, standard_size, snapshot_source, is_used, usage_count, remark, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.recordId}, #{item.classId}, #{item.gradeId}, #{item.snapshotDate}, #{item.studentCount}, #{item.standardSize}, #{item.snapshotSource}, #{item.isUsed}, #{item.usageCount}, #{item.remark}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE class_size_snapshots SET is_used = 1, usage_count = usage_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
